name: Minestra Di Piselli Freschi e Carciofi
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all tough outer leaves from the artichokes.
2. Cut off the tops of the artichokes and trim and peel the bottoms, leaving a bit of the stem.
3. Quarter the artichokes. If using larger artichokes, scrape away the fuzzy choke.
4. Toss with lemon juice.
5. Heat the chicken stock to a simmer in a medium saucepan.
6. In a skillet, heat the butter over medium-high heat. Add the artichokes and garlic, and season with salt and pepper.
7. Saute, tossing occasionally, for 5 minutes.
8. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked artichokes and garlic to the simmering stock.
9. Add parsley and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
10. Uncover and add peas; simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Serve hot with grated Parmesan or Pecorino cheese.
